query:
SELECT ig.name, ig.atoll FROM island_guides ig
LEFT JOIN places p ON ig.name = p.name AND p.type = 'island'
WHERE ig.contentType = 'island' AND p.id IS NULL
ORDER BY ig.atoll, ig.name;
